# Workflow and Studies Page Contracts

<!-- Generated by scripts/generatePageContractsDocs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

Schema version: 2

This document defines handoff-level inputs, outputs, readiness rules, and downstream consumers for every page in the Workflow and Studies navigation dropdowns.

Standard readiness vocabulary: Ready, Missing inputs, Downstream handoff.

Coverage: 74 contracts for 74 navigation routes.

## Workflow

### Planning

#### Project Dashboard (`workflowdashboard.html`)

- Section: Workflow
- Group: Planning
- Workflow step: none

**Standalone Inputs**
- Manual project review, workflow navigation, and sample project loading.

**Project Inputs**
- `equipment` (schedule, required): Equipment tags, ratings, locations, and physical metadata.
- `loadList` (schedule, required): Load tags, source relationships, demand values, and operating metadata.
- `oneLineDiagram` (model, required): One-line components, connections, sheets, layers, and linked schedule references.
- `panelSchedule` (schedule, optional): Panel and circuit records used for load, cable, and one-line handoffs.
- `cableSchedule` (schedule, required): Cable tags, endpoints, conductor details, lengths, and raceway assignments.
- `traySchedule` (schedule, required): Tray IDs, dimensions, fill limits, material, and route geometry.
- `conduitSchedule` (schedule, required): Conduit IDs, trade sizes, fill limits, material, and route geometry.
- `ductbankSchedule` (schedule, optional): Ductbank segments, conduit groups, geometry, and underground routing metadata.
- `studyResults` (study-result, optional): Saved study results available for reports, cross-checks, and downstream studies.
- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.
- `settings.studyApprovals` (setting, optional): Engineer review records for study outputs.
- `settings.reportSnapshots` (setting, optional): Saved report package snapshots used by deliverable pages.
- `settings.lifecyclePackages` (setting, optional): Release package records and lifecycle package history.
- `settings.tccSettings` (setting, optional): Protective device selections, relay settings, chart options, and coordination context.
- `settings.oneLineScheduleReconcilePending` (setting, optional): Flag indicating one-line schedule reconciliation is available.

**Outputs**
- `settings.designBasis` (setting): Design basis wizard decisions and project defaults. Consumers: `workflowdashboard.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `settings.designGateApprovals` (setting): Design gate approvals and flagged review decisions. Consumers: `workflowdashboard.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `settings.latestRouteResults` (setting): Automation-seeded route results when the dashboard workflow runner creates routing output. Consumers: `pullcards.html`, `spoolsheets.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `oneLineDiagram` (model): Automation-seeded one-line model when workflow automation creates starter project data. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `cableSchedule` (schedule): Automation-seeded cable schedule rows. Consumers: `cableschedule.html`, `optimalRoute.html`.
- `traySchedule` (schedule): Automation-seeded tray schedule rows. Consumers: `racewayschedule.html`, `optimalRoute.html`.
- `conduitSchedule` (schedule): Automation-seeded conduit schedule rows. Consumers: `racewayschedule.html`, `optimalRoute.html`.
- `ductbankSchedule` (schedule): Automation-seeded ductbank schedule rows. Consumers: `ductbankroute.html`, `optimalRoute.html`.
- `settings.lifecyclePackages` (setting): Lifecycle package records created from dashboard package actions. Consumers: `projectreport.html`.
- `settings.oneLineScheduleReconcilePending` (setting): Workflow automation reconcile state for one-line and schedule handoff. Consumers: `oneline.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: Dashboard is ready when it can summarize every workflow step and identify the next incomplete handoff.
- Blockers: Missing schedule data, unresolved review gates, pending studies, or no deliverables.

**Downstream Pages**
- `equipmentlist.html`
- `loadlist.html`
- `oneline.html`
- `cableschedule.html`
- `racewayschedule.html`
- `projectreport.html`

**Notes**
- This page aggregates workflow state instead of belonging to a single workflow step.

#### Scenario Comparison (`scenarios.html`)

- Section: Workflow
- Group: Planning
- Workflow step: none

**Standalone Inputs**
- Scenario names, imported project snapshots, and comparison selections.

**Project Inputs**
- `equipment` (schedule, required): Equipment tags, ratings, locations, and physical metadata.
- `loadList` (schedule, required): Load tags, source relationships, demand values, and operating metadata.
- `oneLineDiagram` (model, required): One-line components, connections, sheets, layers, and linked schedule references.
- `panelSchedule` (schedule, optional): Panel and circuit records used for load, cable, and one-line handoffs.
- `cableSchedule` (schedule, required): Cable tags, endpoints, conductor details, lengths, and raceway assignments.
- `traySchedule` (schedule, required): Tray IDs, dimensions, fill limits, material, and route geometry.
- `conduitSchedule` (schedule, required): Conduit IDs, trade sizes, fill limits, material, and route geometry.
- `ductbankSchedule` (schedule, optional): Ductbank segments, conduit groups, geometry, and underground routing metadata.
- `studyResults` (study-result, optional): Saved study results available for reports, cross-checks, and downstream studies.
- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.
- `settings.scenarios` (setting, optional): Scenario registry and active scenario selection.

**Outputs**
- `export-only` (export): Scenario comparison tables and exports.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: Ready when at least two named scenarios can be compared or a baseline scenario can be cloned.
- Blockers: Only one scenario exists or selected scenario data is empty.

**Downstream Pages**
- `workflowdashboard.html`
- `projectreport.html`

**Notes**
- Scenario storage is project workflow context, not a standalone engineering result.

#### Equipment List (`equipmentlist.html`)

- Workflow step: equipmentList

- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.

**Outputs**
- `equipment` (schedule): Major equipment register with tags, ratings, arrangements, dimensions, and locations. Consumers: `equipmentarrangements.html`, `mcclineup.html`, `loadlist.html`, `oneline.html`, `equipmentevaluation.html`.
- `settings.equipmentColumns` (setting): Equipment table display configuration. Consumers: `equipmentlist.html`.
- `settings.equipmentFilterPresets` (setting): Saved equipment filter presets. Consumers: `equipmentlist.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: At least one meaningful equipment row exists.
- Blockers: No equipment tags or starter records have been added.

#### One-Line (`oneline.html`)

- Section: Workflow
- Group: Planning
- Workflow step: oneLineDiagram

**Standalone Inputs**
- Manual diagram drawing, palette components, imported sample diagrams, and reconcile choices.

**Project Inputs**
- `equipment` (schedule, required): Equipment tags, ratings, locations, and physical metadata.
- `loadList` (schedule, required): Load tags, source relationships, demand values, and operating metadata.
- `panelSchedule` (schedule, optional): Panel and circuit records used for load, cable, and one-line handoffs.
- `cableSchedule` (schedule, required): Cable tags, endpoints, conductor details, lengths, and raceway assignments.
- `traySchedule` (schedule, required): Tray IDs, dimensions, fill limits, material, and route geometry.
- `conduitSchedule` (schedule, required): Conduit IDs, trade sizes, fill limits, material, and route geometry.
- `studyResults` (study-result, optional): Saved study results available for reports, cross-checks, and downstream studies.
- `settings.tccSettings` (setting, optional): Protective device selections, relay settings, chart options, and coordination context.
- `settings.manufacturerDefaults` (setting, optional): Manufacturer default selections for one-line component properties.
- `settings.oneLineDiagramFilterMode` (setting, optional): One-line component filter mode.
- `settings.diagramScale` (setting, optional): Diagram scale setting.
- `settings.diagramZoom` (setting, optional): Diagram zoom state.
- `settings.studySettings` (setting, optional): One-line embedded study settings.
- `settings.gridSize` (setting, optional): Diagram grid size.
- `settings.gridEnabled` (setting, optional): Diagram grid visibility.
- `settings.labelPrefixes` (setting, optional): One-line label prefix settings.
- `settings.labelCounters` (setting, optional): One-line label counter state.

- `settings.orthogonalRouting` (setting, optional): Orthogonal connection routing preference.

- `settings.diagramTitleBlock` (setting, optional): One-line title block fields.

- `settings.gistToken` (setting, optional): Gist import/export token setting.

**Outputs**
- `oneLineDiagram` (model): One-line sheets, components, connections, layers, protection zones, and linked schedule refs. Consumers: `loadFlow.html`, `shortCircuit.html`, `arcFlash.html`, `tcc.html`, `designrulechecker.html`.
- `cableSchedule` (schedule): Explicit reconcile-created or reconcile-updated cable rows. Consumers: `cableschedule.html`, `optimalRoute.html`.

- `traySchedule` (schedule): Raceway records created from one-line route actions. Consumers: `racewayschedule.html`.
- `conduitSchedule` (schedule): Conduit records created from one-line route actions. Consumers: `racewayschedule.html`.
- `studyResults` (study-result): Embedded one-line study result container. Consumers: `projectreport.html`.
- `studyResults.loadFlow` (study-result): Embedded load-flow result generated from one-line. Consumers: `loadFlow.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `studyResults.shortCircuit` (study-result): Embedded short-circuit result generated from one-line. Consumers: `shortCircuit.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `studyResults.arcFlash` (study-result): Embedded arc-flash result generated from one-line. Consumers: `arcFlash.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `studyResults.harmonics` (study-result): Embedded harmonics result generated from one-line. Consumers: `harmonics.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `studyResults.motorStart` (study-result): Embedded motor-start result generated from one-line. Consumers: `motorStart.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `studyResults.reliability` (study-result): Embedded reliability result generated from one-line. Consumers: `reliability.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `studyResults.duty` (study-result): Embedded equipment-duty result generated from one-line validation. Consumers: `equipmentevaluation.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `settings.scenarios` (setting): Active scenario selection restored during one-line project import. Consumers: `scenarios.html`.
- `settings.studySettings` (setting): One-line embedded study settings. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.diagramZoom` (setting): Diagram zoom state. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.labelCounters` (setting): One-line label counter state. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.labelPrefixes` (setting): One-line label prefix settings. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.manufacturerDefaults` (setting): Manufacturer default selections for one-line component properties. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.gridEnabled` (setting): Diagram grid visibility. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.diagramDatablockConfig` (setting): One-line datablock display configuration. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.diagramScale` (setting): Diagram scale setting. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.layersPanelOpen` (setting): Layer panel open/closed state. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.gridSize` (setting): Diagram grid size. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.oneLineDiagramFilterMode` (setting): One-line component filter mode. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.orthogonalRouting` (setting): Orthogonal connection routing preference. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.symbolStandard` (setting): ANSI/IEC symbol standard selection. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.diagramTitleBlock` (setting): One-line title block fields. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.gistToken` (setting): Gist import/export token setting. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.onelineTemplates` (setting): Reusable one-line component templates saved with project settings. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `settings.oneLineScheduleReconcilePending` (setting): Flag indicating that schedule reconciliation is available. Consumers: `workflowdashboard.html`.

### Cable

#### Cable Schedule (`cableschedule.html`)

- Section: Workflow
- Group: Cable
- Workflow step: cableSchedule

**Standalone Inputs**
- Manual cable rows, template selection, imports, inline edits, and report options.

**Project Inputs**
- `equipment` (schedule, required): Equipment tags, ratings, locations, and physical metadata.
- `loadList` (schedule, required): Load tags, source relationships, demand values, and operating metadata.
- `panelSchedule` (schedule, optional): Panel and circuit records used for load, cable, and one-line handoffs.
- `oneLineDiagram` (model, required): One-line components, connections, sheets, layers, and linked schedule references.
- `traySchedule` (schedule, required): Tray IDs, dimensions, fill limits, material, and route geometry.
- `conduitSchedule` (schedule, required): Conduit IDs, trade sizes, fill limits, material, and route geometry.
- `ductbankSchedule` (schedule, optional): Ductbank segments, conduit groups, geometry, and underground routing metadata.
- `settings.cableTagSettings` (setting, optional): Cable tag generation settings.
- `settings.cableChangeLog` (setting, optional): Cable schedule change log entries.
- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.

**Outputs**
- `cableSchedule` (schedule): Cable rows with tags, endpoints, conductor details, length, and raceway assignments. Consumers: `racewayschedule.html`, `cabletrayfill.html`, `conduitfill.html`, `optimalRoute.html`, `voltagedropstudy.html`.
- `settings.cableTemplates` (setting): User-maintained cable templates. Consumers: `cableschedule.html`.
- `settings.cableTagSettings` (setting): Cable tag generation settings. Consumers: `cableschedule.html`.
- `settings.cableChangeLog` (setting): Cable schedule change log entries. Consumers: `cableschedule.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: Every workflow cable row has tag, from/to, conductor size, and length.
- Blockers: Missing tag, endpoints, conductor size, or length on one or more cable rows.

**Downstream Pages**
- `racewayschedule.html`
- `cabletrayfill.html`
- `conduitfill.html`
- `optimalRoute.html`

**Notes**
- None.

#### Panel Schedule (`panelschedule.html`)

- Section: Workflow
- Group: Cable
- Workflow step: cableSchedule

**Standalone Inputs**
- Panel definitions, circuit rows, breaker selections, connected loads, and cable tags.

**Project Inputs**
- `equipment` (schedule, required): Equipment tags, ratings, locations, and physical metadata.
- `loadList` (schedule, required): Load tags, source relationships, demand values, and operating metadata.
- `cableSchedule` (schedule, required): Cable tags, endpoints, conductor details, lengths, and raceway assignments.
- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.

**Outputs**
- `panelSchedule` (schedule): Panel metadata, circuit schedules, breaker assignments, and served load links. Consumers: `loadlist.html`, `oneline.html`, `cableschedule.html`.
- `loadList` (schedule): Panel-driven load updates when circuit edits create or update served loads. Consumers: `loadlist.html`, `demandschedule.html`.
- `cableSchedule` (schedule): Panel-driven cable references when circuit rows create cable links. Consumers: `cableschedule.html`.
- `equipment` (schedule): Panel-driven equipment updates for synchronized panel records. Consumers: `equipmentlist.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: Ready when panels have valid IDs and circuit rows are internally consistent.
- Blockers: Panel ID, voltage, circuit count, or connected load data is incomplete.

**Downstream Pages**
- `loadlist.html`
- `oneline.html`
- `cableschedule.html`

**Notes**
- None.

#### Fault Cable Bracing (`cableFaultBracing.html`)

- Section: Workflow
- Group: Cable
- Workflow step: studies

**Standalone Inputs**

**Project Inputs**
- `cableSchedule` (schedule, required): Cable tags, endpoints, conductor details, lengths, and raceway assignments.
- `studyResults.shortCircuit` (study-result, optional): Fault current results used to seed bracing current inputs.
- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.

**Outputs**
- `export-only` (export): Fault cable bracing requirements and cleat force reports. Consumers: `projectreport.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: Ready when fault current, spacing, and cleat data are valid.
- Blockers: Missing fault current, invalid spacing, or unsupported system type.

**Downstream Pages**
- `projectreport.html`

### Raceway

#### Raceway Schedule (`racewayschedule.html`)

- Section: Workflow
- Group: Raceway
- Workflow step: racewaySchedule

**Standalone Inputs**
- Tray, conduit, ductbank, CAD import, geometry, and fill setup rows.

**Project Inputs**
- `cableSchedule` (schedule, required): Cable tags, endpoints, conductor details, lengths, and raceway assignments.
- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.

**Outputs**
- `traySchedule` (schedule): Tray records with dimensions, material, capacity, and geometry. Consumers: `cabletrayfill.html`, `optimalRoute.html`, `trayhardwarebom.html`, `windload.html`.
- `conduitSchedule` (schedule): Conduit records with trade size, material, capacity, and geometry. Consumers: `conduitfill.html`, `ductbankroute.html`, `optimalRoute.html`.
- `ductbankSchedule` (schedule): Ductbank records and conduit grouping metadata. Consumers: `ductbankroute.html`, `optimalRoute.html`.
- `cableSchedule` (schedule): Raceway assignment edits written back to cable rows. Consumers: `cableschedule.html`.
- `settings.trayFillData` (setting): Selected tray fill handoff data. Consumers: `cabletrayfill.html`.
- `settings.conduitFillData` (setting): Selected conduit fill handoff data. Consumers: `conduitfill.html`.
- `settings.ductbankSession` (setting): Ductbank schedule handoff state. Consumers: `ductbankroute.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: At least one tray, conduit, or ductbank record exists.
- Blockers: No routeable raceway records have been added.

**Downstream Pages**
- `cabletrayfill.html`
- `conduitfill.html`
- `ductbankroute.html`
- `optimalRoute.html`

**Notes**
- None.

- `settings.ductbankPanZoom` (setting, optional): Ductbank canvas pan and zoom state.
- `settings.ductbankSession` (setting, optional): Ductbank page session state.
- `settings.ductbankRouteData` (setting, optional): Selected ductbank route handoff data.
- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.

**Outputs**
- `settings.ductbankPanZoom` (setting): Ductbank canvas pan and zoom state. Consumers: `ductbankroute.html`.
- `settings.ductbankSession` (setting): Ductbank page session state. Consumers: `ductbankroute.html`.
- `settings.ductbankRouteData` (setting): Selected ductbank route handoff data. Consumers: `ductbankroute.html`.
- `export-only` (export): Ductbank calculation reports and route exports. Consumers: `projectreport.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: Ready when ductbanks or conduits exist and selected cables can be assigned to underground routes.

- `projectreport.html`

#### Tray Fill (`cabletrayfill.html`)

- Section: Workflow
- Group: Raceway
- Workflow step: fillRouting

**Standalone Inputs**

**Project Inputs**

- `traySchedule` (schedule, required): Tray IDs, dimensions, fill limits, material, and route geometry.
- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.

**Outputs**
- `settings.trayFillData` (setting): Selected tray and cable context handed off from Raceway Schedule. Consumers: `cabletrayfill.html`.
- `export-only` (export): Tray fill calculation tables and reports. Consumers: `designrulechecker.html`, `projectreport.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: Ready when at least one tray and at least one schedule-ready cable are available.
- Blockers: No trays, no schedule-ready cables, or cable dimensions are missing.

- `designrulechecker.html`
- `optimalRoute.html`
- `projectreport.html`

- None.

#### Conduit Bend Schedule (`conduitbend.html`)

- Section: Workflow
- Group: Raceway
- Workflow step: fillRouting

**Standalone Inputs**
- Conduit run bend list, pull-box locations, layout inputs, and imported route bends.

**Project Inputs**

### Protection

#### TCC (`tcc.html`)

**Standalone Inputs**

- `cableSchedule` (schedule, required): Cable tags, endpoints, conductor details, lengths, and raceway assignments.
- `studyResults.shortCircuit` (study-result, optional): Fault current values used for coordination context.
- `studyResults.arcFlash` (study-result, optional): Arc flash results used for equipment overlays.
- `settings.tccSettings` (setting, optional): Protective device selections, relay settings, chart options, and coordination context.

**Outputs**

- `oneLineDiagram` (model): One-line protection zone and context updates from TCC review flows. Consumers: `oneline.html`.
- `studyResults.shortCircuit` (study-result): Short-circuit result generated from TCC short-circuit helper flows. Consumers: `arcFlash.html`, `equipmentevaluation.html`.
- `studyResults.tcc` (study-result): Coordination analysis snapshots when saved from TCC review flows. Consumers: `projectreport.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: Ready when at least two protective devices or a selected one-line context can be plotted.

- PV/BESS inverter ratings, control mode, fault contribution, ride-through, and compliance inputs.

**Project Inputs**
- `equipment` (schedule, required): Equipment tags, ratings, locations, and physical metadata.
- `oneLineDiagram` (model, required): One-line components, connections, sheets, layers, and linked schedule references.
- `studyResults.loadFlow` (study-result, optional): Operating-point context for inverter models.
- `studyResults.pvResult` (study-result, optional): PV model result used by the IBR page.
- `studyResults.bessResult` (study-result, optional): BESS model result used by the IBR page.
- `studyResults.faultResult` (study-result, optional): IBR fault contribution result.
- `studyResults.voltVarResult` (study-result, optional): IBR volt-var result.
- `settings.designBasis` (setting, optional): Project code basis, sizing defaults, routing defaults, and study prerequisites.
- `settings.studyApprovals` (setting, optional): Engineer review records for study outputs.

**Outputs**
- `studyResults.ibr` (study-result): Saved inverter-based resource model, fault contribution, and ride-through results. Consumers: `derinterconnect.html`, `shortCircuit.html`, `projectreport.html`.
- `settings.studyApprovals` (setting): Engineer approval records written by the shared study approval panel. Consumers: `projectreport.html`.
- `export-only` (export): IBR model and compliance exports. Consumers: `projectreport.html`.

**Readiness**
- Ready when: Ready when inverter ratings and control assumptions are valid.
- Blockers: Missing inverter rating, control mode, or interconnection voltage data.

**Downstream Pages**
- `derinterconnect.html`
- `shortCircuit.html`
- `projectreport.html`

**Notes**
- None.
